'''Muzara''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. [[Human/Legends|Humans]] from [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]] colonized the planet in [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], barely avoiding conflict with the native Muzaran people, who were also known as the [[Muza]].

The first Human settlement was built on the top of a high plateau, and was organized by the [[Brentaal League]], which hoped the world would make a profitable [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]].

The Humans brought [[harvester crawler]]s to Muzara, automated farming machines which tilled, sowed and harvested crops. The crawlers were purchased by groups of families, who also purchased claims on vast swaths of the planet.

{{Planet-stub}}
